articles.title: Oil Prices Go Up Even with More Oil Released
articles.summary: Oil prices went up to over $100 a barrel, even though countries agreed to release a lot of oil to help lower prices. This happened because ships carrying oil were attacked in the Gulf, making people worried about getting enough oil. The Strait of Hormuz is an important waterway for oil ships, but it is closed because of attacks. When ships are attacked, it can make oil prices go higher. Stock markets in Europe and Japan fell because people are concerned about the economy. The International Energy Agency said this is causing a big problem in getting oil to people. They released 400 million barrels of oil to try to help, but prices still went up after more attacks.

articles.title: A Special Album for Shane MacGowan
articles.summary: Three years after Shane MacGowan died, many famous musicians are making a tribute album to honor him. Shane was a singer in a band called The Pogues and wrote songs about Irish immigrants' lives. The album, called 20th Century Paddy - The Songs of Shane MacGowan, will come out in November. It includes songs by Bruce Springsteen, Hozier, Jessie Buckley, and others. Bruce Springsteen wrote an essay saying Shane's songs were raw, funny, and deep. Shane's wife, Victoria, helped make the album and said it celebrates his spirit. The album has a duet with Johnny Depp and Imelda May, and features bands like The Jesus and Mary Chain. Shane died in 2023 at age 65 after being sick. His music tells stories with references to books and myths, and Springsteen thinks people will listen to it for many years.

articles.title: Jack Osbourne Names Baby After His Dad
articles.summary: Jack Osbourne and his wife Aree have a new baby girl. They named her Ozzy after Jack's dad, who passed away eight months ago. The baby is pictured with a bat toy, which reminds people of a funny story about Ozzy Sr., who was a famous rock singer. Jack has other children too, including a three-year-old daughter named Maple. Jack shared the happy news after he left a TV show called I'm A Celebrity. Ozzy Sr. was honored at a music awards show recently. Jack and his mom Sharon also talked about bringing back a music festival called Ozzfest in 2027. They want to have it at a big stadium and in the US. This festival is for rock music fans and last happened in 2018.

articles.title: Sonay Kartal's Injury Ends Her Tennis Match
articles.summary: Sonay Kartal, a tennis player from Britain, had to stop playing in an important match at Indian Wells because of a back injury. She was playing against Elena Rybakina, who is ranked third in the world. Kartal had been getting medical help during the match because her back hurt a lot. She lost the first set 6-4 and was behind in the second set when she decided she couldn't continue. Kartal said the pain got worse as the match went on, and it was 'one match too many.' She had been dealing with this injury throughout the tournament but tried her best. Even though she was hurt, she made the match competitive. Kartal is the first British woman to reach the fourth round at Indian Wells twice. Rybakina will now play in the next round against another player.

articles.title: A Star's Strange Flicker: Did Two Planets Crash?
articles.summary: Astronomers saw a star named Gaia20ehk acting strangely. It is like our sun and usually shines steadily, but it started flickering and dimming in 2020. Andy Tzanidakis, a student, noticed this while looking at old telescope data. The star is far away, about 11,000 light years from Earth. Scientists think the flickering happened because rock and dust blocked the star's light. They believe this dust came from two planets crashing into each other. This is a big deal because it helps us learn how planets form, like Earth and the moon did long ago. The team published their findings in a science journal. They used infrared light to see that the dust was hot, which fits with a collision. This discovery shows how astronomers use telescopes to find exciting events in space.

articles.title: A Star Explosion with a Chirping Sound
articles.summary: Astronomers found a special star explosion called a supernova that made a strange chirping signal. This supernova, named SN 2024afav, is very bright and far away in space. A student named Joseph Farah noticed the signal while studying it. The chirp got faster over time, like a bird chirping quicker. Scientists think a magnetar, which is a fast-spinning star with a strong magnetic field, might be causing this. Magnetars can make supernovae brighter by giving them energy. This discovery helps us learn more about how stars explode and what happens after. It shows that space is full of surprises and new things to discover.
